description: Address review issues: CORS misconfiguration, Telegram allowed-users caching, DatabaseManager singleton for web routes, TTS temp file collision, and mixed UTC/local time in proactive triggers.
steps: Fix CORS misconfiguration in interfaces/web_dashboard/app.py - Remove allow_credentials=True
Fix Telegram allowed-users re-parsed per message - Cache at bot init
Fix DatabaseManager instantiated per request in web routes - Create shared singleton
Fix TTS temp file collision - Use unique filenames
Fix mixed UTC/local time in proactive triggers - Use local time consistently
acceptance_criteria: app.py does not have allow_credentials=True with allow_origins=['*']
Telegram handlers use a cached allowed_users list instead of re-parsing env per message
Web routes share a single DatabaseManager instance
TTS generates unique filenames for each audio file
Proactive triggers use datetime.now() consistently instead of mixing utcnow()
verification: python -c "import sys; sys.path.insert(0, 'J.A.R.V.I.S_system'); from interfaces.web_dashboard.app import app; from interfaces.telegram_bot.bot import TelegramBot; from interfaces.voice.text_to_speech import TextToSpeech; from interfaces.proactive.triggers import check_upcoming_deadlines; print('All imports OK')"
